UPSInRegionFreeThreshold.description: Dollar PRODUCT (inventory items) subtotal at/above which UPS Ground shipping to an in-region state (GA, TN, TX, NC, FL, SC, AL), Atlanta home delivery, and Southeast pickup are free. Replaces the hard-coded $250 in the storefront's free-shipping.ts. Units: whole dollars (matches PlantPickupDiscountThreshold). Compared against product subtotal only — excludes shipping, tax, and non-inventory line items.

UPSNationalFreeThreshold.description: Dollar PRODUCT subtotal at/above which UPS Ground shipping to an out-of-region (national) state is free. Replaces the hard-coded $500 in the storefront's free-shipping.ts. Units: whole dollars. Compared against product subtotal only.

UPSGroundBreakpoints.description: Editable UPS Ground rate breakpoint table (issue #266). Each row: BreakpointPrice (product subtotal $ threshold, ascending) -> ShippingRate ($ charge). The storefront/medusa-admin picks the row whose BreakpointPrice the PRODUCT subtotal clears. Leave empty to keep real-time carrier rates (EnableRealTimeRates).
